meta.title: Global Data 468 — Analyze, Optimize, Grow
meta.description: Andorran data analytics and sponsorship consulting firm. We turn data into decisions, and decisions into growth.

hero.subtitle: We turn complex data into clear decisions for brands, sponsors and sports and cultural properties worldwide.

senior.label: Senior Team
senior.desc: Consolidated expertise in sponsorship and data

trust.label: Full Confidentiality
trust.desc: Discretion and rigour in every project

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Three areas, one goal: data-driven decisions.

analytics.title: Data Analytics
analytics.description: Business intelligence, real-time dashboards, market reports and predictive modeling to anticipate trends.

extraction.title: Data Extraction
extraction.description: Ethical scraping, sports and cultural API integrations, and robust, scalable data pipelines.

sponsorship.title: Sponsorship Consulting
sponsorship.description: Sponsor search for properties, property search for brands, asset valuation and ROI tracking.

formation.title: Training
formation.description: Training programmes in sponsorship marketing and ROI measurement for brands, properties, clubs and public administrations.

market.title: Market Research
market.description: Online and offline brand awareness, recall and perception studies for brands, sports properties, clubs and institutions.

strategy.title: Strategy & Digital Transformation
strategy.description: We guide organisations through their strategic evolution and digital transformation, from diagnosis to implementation of solutions that drive growth.

methodology.title: How we work
methodology.subtitle: A clear, structured process focused on results.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.description: We collect data, run market studies and activate business intelligence to deeply understand every challenge.

optimize.title: Optimize
optimize.description: We design the strategy, identify sponsorship opportunities and align brand and property to maximise value.

grow.title: Grow
grow.description: We support implementation, measure ROI and ensure every decision translates into real, measurable growth.

finalCta.title: Ready to optimize your growth?
finalCta.subtitle: Let's talk about how data can transform your strategy.

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.subtitle: End-to-end data solutions and sponsorship consulting.

analytics.title: Data Analytics
analytics.description: We turn raw data into actionable business intelligence.
items: Business Intelligence and interactive dashboards
Sector market reports
Predictive modeling and forecasting
Performance analysis and custom KPIs

extraction.title: Data Extraction
extraction.description: We capture and structure data from any source, ethically and reliably.
items: Ethical, compliant web scraping
Sports and cultural API integrations
Automated data pipelines
Data cleaning, normalization and enrichment

sponsorship.title: Sponsorship Consulting
sponsorship.description: We connect brands and properties through data-driven strategy.
items: Sponsor search for sports and cultural properties
Property search aligned with brand values
Sponsorship asset valuation
ROI tracking and optimization

formation.title: Sponsorship & ROI Training
formation.description: We train teams and organisations to make data-driven sponsorship decisions and measure their real return.
items: Sponsorship marketing: strategy and activation
ROI calculation for sponsoring brands
Value measurement for properties and sports clubs
Workshops for public administrations and cultural institutions
In-person and online formats, tailored to each profile

market.title: Online & Offline Market Research
market.description: We design and run quantitative and qualitative market studies to measure brand awareness, recall and perception in digital and in-person settings.
items: Spontaneous and prompted brand recall analysis
Online awareness studies (digital panels, social media)
Offline research: in-person surveys, focus groups, interviews
Brand perception and positioning measurement
Periodic image-tracking reports for clubs, properties and institutions

strategy.title: Strategic Consulting & Digital Transformation
strategy.description: We accompany sports, cultural and institutional organisations through their strategic evolution and process digitalisation, with a practical, results-driven approach.
items: Strategic diagnosis and business model definition
Digitalisation of operational and reporting processes
Implementation of management tools and data platforms
Revenue diversification for clubs, properties and institutions
Executive support through change and growth processes

rigor.title: Rigor
